snippet.title: Sunday Worship | First Service | 24 May 2026
snippet.description:
Let's gather to worship the Lord corporately and to take part in the holy communion.

Please do join us every Sunday at 7:00 am IST.

Emmanuel House of Worship also meets for below programs:

👉Sunday Worship 2nd Service (English & Telugu) at 9:00 am IST
👉Youth Fellowship on Sunday after the Second Service,
👉Wednesday Bible Study at 7 pm IST,
👉All Day Prayer on Second Saturday at 10 am IST and


Also follow Emmanuel House of Worship on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/emmanuelhouseofworshiphyd

#SundayWorship #LiveWorship #EHOWSecunderabad
